Token-Powered Gas Fees Ease Ethereum Transaction Hurdles
data.description:
Ethereum users have long struggled with failed transactions due to insufficient ETH for gas fees. On February 4, MetaMask introduced its new Gas Station feature to tackle this common issue. The update allows users to pay gas fees using select tokens rather than relying solely on ETH. This move comes as Ethereum faces increased network […]
The post Token-Powered Gas Fees Ease Ethereum...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/05/token-powered-gas-fees-ease-ethereum-transaction-hurdles/

data.title: XRP Price Enters Golden Pocket: Analyst Says It’s A Good Buy At These Levels
data.description:
The XRP price has entered a Golden Pocket—a key Fibonacci retracement level that often acts as strong support. According to a crypto analyst, this new development could present an attractive buying opportunity for investors, especially as the market consolidates. data.title: Ex-Google Engineer Faces Espionage Charges Over Alleged AI Data Theft for China
data.description:
A former Google software engineer, Linwei (Leon) Ding, has been charged with economic espionage after allegedly stealing critical AI-related data, according to the U.S. Department of Justice.
The post Ex-Google Engineer Faces Espionage Charges Over Alleged AI Data Theft for China appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/ex-google-engineer-faces-espionage-charges-over-alleged-ai-data-theft-for-china/

data.title: Bitcoin no longer a ‘fringe asset,’ says top Bitcoin mining exec
data.description:
